_fixture_note: Three entries: one anonymized real clean query, one REAL local-storage-spill result (a deliberate 12M-row cross join actually run in the account, byte count genuine), and one synthetic remote-storage-spill + poor-pruning query (to exercise those two branches' schema before either fired live). Update 2026-07-17: poor_partition_pruning has since genuinely fired live too (a real SELECT * full-table scan, 528/528 partitions) -- see the SKILL.md's verification table for the real numbers; this fixture's synthetic entry is kept as-is since it still validates the schema and remote-storage-spill remains unfired. Used by the fixture-test CI check: assertions are structural (issue schema present, severity/evidence/recommendation fields populated), never on exact wording.

results.query_text_preview:
create or replace transient table DEMO_DB.MART.mart_customer_ltv
         as
        (with fct as (
    select * from DEMO_DB.FCT.fct_customers
),
ltv as (
    select

SELECT a.customer_id, b.product_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM RAW.RAW_CUSTOMERS a
CROSS JOIN RAW.RAW_PRODUCTS b
GROUP BY a.customer_id, b.product_id
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

issues.recommendation: Query needs more memory than the warehouse provides. Consider a larger warehouse size, or reduce intermediate result size (push filters/aggregations earlier).

results.query_text_preview: select * from DEMO_DB.FCT.fct_orders o join DEMO_DB.FCT.fct_order_items i on o.order_id = i.order_id

issues.recommendation: Warehouse is undersized for this query's working set -- increase warehouse size, or reduce the data volume processed (filter earlier, avoid a full unfiltered join).
Query is scanning most of the table. Check whether the WHERE clause filters on the table's clustering key, or consider re-clustering on the columns this query filters by.
